calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Continued To Aug-31-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference.
Daniel Gopstein, Esq., of QUILL & ARROW, LLP. Tel:(310) 933-4271 for plaintiff.
Danielle Greenstein, Esq., of Nelson Mullins, Tel:(619) 541-7325 for defendant.

Hearing held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from defendant's counsel regarding that Defendant has not satisfied the initial burden of proof. The matter argued/discussed. The Court reviewed the pleadings and heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is taken under submission .

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing An order DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is sig.***

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Jun-29-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAUL VASQUEZ' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Plaintiff Raul O. Gopar's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Luis Serrano, Esq. (310) 933-4271 QUILL & ARROW, LLP for Plaintiff
Samantha Geraghty, Esq. 949-296-0710 Evans Fears Schuttert McNulty Mickus for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Geraghty requests more time on compliance. Mr. Serrano responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAUL VASQUEZ's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling and modifies compliance date to 3/14/25.

Plaintiff Raul Vasquez's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
